case_title: NICOLE BRONSON VS. MICHAEL JAMES ALLEN SR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,200.00 FILED BY BRONSON, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN SR., MICHAEL JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRONSON, NICOLE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2010. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES, BOTH EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT. 27, 2010 BY JPT. DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRONSON, NICOLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN SR., MICHAEL JAMES PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT SHE IS OWED MONEY FROM DEFENDANT. EVEN IF SHE IS, PLAINTIFF OWES MONEY TO DEFENDANT WHICH WOULD OFFSET ANY AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BRONSON, NICOLE
DUE DILIGENCE FROM THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-18-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-27-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-30-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN SR., MICHAEL JAMES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2010 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-27-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
